column1: Visited Perfect Jewels at shop 277 Johri Bazar last week and was genuinely impressed. Their kundan collection is extensive and the pricing felt fair for the quality. Staff explained each piece patiently without pushing for a sale. Will return for my sister's wedding jewellery.

The bridal kundan sets here are absolutely stunning. I had visited several shops in Johri Bazar before settling here. The finishing on the gold polished pieces was far superior to others I had seen. Picked up a full set for my daughter's wedding at a very reasonable price.

Stumbled upon this shop while exploring Jaipur's famous jewellery market. The meena work on their earrings and bangles is intricate and beautifully done. Prices are surprisingly affordable given the quality. Definitely one of the better finds in Johri Bazar.

We ordered customized jewellery for a bulk order for our boutique and the team delivered exactly what we needed. Good communication throughout, timely delivery, and the pieces looked exactly like the samples shown. Reliable vendor for wholesale requirements.

The oxidized silver jewellery collection here is one of the best I've come across in Jaipur. Each piece has a distinct character and the craftsmanship is evident. Bought several necklaces and they have held up well even after regular use.

As someone who regularly sources jewellery for resale, I've worked with many wholesalers in Jaipur. This shop offers some of the most competitive rates without compromising on finish quality. The kundan meena pieces are especially popular with my customers.

Bought a silver polished jewellery set for my niece's engagement and she absolutely loved it. The set looked premium and elegant. The shop at Johri Bazar was easy to find and the staff was warm and accommodating. Very satisfied with the experience.

Their artificial diamond necklace collection is genuinely impressive. Each piece is crafted with care and the stones are set neatly without any visible flaws. Purchased two necklaces and received many compliments at the event. Worth every rupee spent.

Perfect Jewels in Johri Bazar has a remarkable range of traditional Jaipur jewellery. From temple style pieces to modern fusion designs, they seem to stock everything. My first purchase here and already planning to come back for more.

The wholesale rates here are among the best I've found in the entire Johri Bazar market. I stock jewellery for my store in Delhi and this shop has become my go-to source. Quality is consistent and the team is professional in their dealings.

Fantastic collection of designer pendant sets and choker necklaces. Bought a few pieces for personal use and gifted some to friends. Everyone who received them asked where I got them from. Highly recommended for anyone visiting Jaipur's jewellery market.

I was looking for traditional jadau jewellery for a family function and this shop had an excellent range. The pieces were authentic looking and well finished. Got a good discount on bulk purchase. Very happy with the overall transaction.

Visited during my Rajasthan trip specifically to buy Jaipur jewellery. The shopkeeper here was knowledgeable and helped me understand the difference between various types of kundan work. Ended up buying more than planned because the designs were so beautiful.

The party wear imitation jewellery collection here is trendy and well priced. Found several unique designs that I hadn't seen elsewhere in the market. The staff was patient while I browsed through multiple trays and never rushed me.

Ordered a bulk consignment of artificial jewellery for export and was very impressed with the quality control. Every piece was neatly packed and matched the specifications we had agreed upon. Will be continuing this partnership for future orders.

The gold polished imitation jewellery at this shop has an excellent finish that closely resembles real gold. My mother was initially skeptical but was convinced once she saw the pieces in person. Bought a full bridal set and it looked magnificent.

Great experience shopping here. The jhumkas and traditional earrings collection is vast and each design is unique. Prices are clearly marked which removes the awkwardness of bargaining. Found exactly what I was looking for within minutes of entering the shop.

Came here looking for wholesale jewellery for my boutique and left fully satisfied. The team showed us samples from their manufacturing range and the quality was evident. Direct factory pricing made this a very cost-effective sourcing option.

Their meenakari work is among the finest you'll find in Jaipur. The detailing on the enamel pieces is precise and the colors are vibrant without looking garish. Bought several sets as gifts and they were received with great appreciation.

The selection of Victorian style jewellery here surprised me. I expected only traditional Rajasthani designs but they have a good mix of modern and heritage styles. Staff was friendly and helped me put together a cohesive look for an event.

Visited shop 277 in Johri Bazar and was immediately drawn in by the display. The antique gold plated pieces had a beautiful aged finish that looked incredibly authentic. Bought a necklace and pair of earrings that became instant favorites.

One of the most well organized jewellery shops I've visited in Jaipur. Everything was displayed clearly by category which made browsing easy. The staff was helpful without being overbearing. Great place for both casual shoppers and serious buyers.

Their bridal choker sets are absolutely breathtaking. The detailing on the kundan inlay is meticulous and the overall weight and feel of the pieces suggests superior quality. This is now my recommended stop for bridal jewellery shopping in Jaipur.

I run a small online jewellery business and have been looking for a reliable supplier in Jaipur. Found exactly what I needed here. The pieces photograph beautifully and customers have been happy with the quality. Excellent business partner.

The temple jewellery collection here is extensive and authentic looking. Pieces are well finished with clean lines and neat stone settings. Bought several necklaces and earrings sets and have received nothing but compliments since wearing them.

Pleasantly surprised by the range of daily wear artificial jewellery available here. Not just heavy bridal pieces but also lightweight everyday options in good designs. Prices are very reasonable and the quality holds up well over time.

This is easily one of the top rated jewellery shops in the Johri Bazar area. The kundan meena collection is particularly impressive in terms of variety and craftsmanship. Staff is knowledgeable and genuinely helpful in making the right choice.

Bought a wedding jewellery collection here for my cousin's marriage and every piece was well received. The set we chose had a beautiful mix of kundan and meena work and the silver polishing was flawless. Great value for money overall.

The shop has a calm and organized ambiance which makes jewellery shopping here quite enjoyable. Not too crowded or chaotic. Staff gives you space to browse and steps in when you need guidance. Found several beautiful pieces at fair prices.

Their latest 2026 jewellery designs are very much in tune with current fashion trends while retaining a traditional Jaipur essence. Found some really unique pendant sets and statement earrings. Definitely worth a visit if you're in the city.

Sourced jewellery here for my retail store and the experience was professional from start to finish. Samples were provided promptly, order was processed efficiently, and delivery was on schedule. Exactly the kind of vendor relationship I was looking for.

The craftsmanship on their jadau jewellery pieces is exceptional. You can see the effort and skill that goes into each piece. Bought a full set for a wedding function and it held up beautifully through a long day of celebrations and photographs.

Excellent finishing on all the pieces I bought here. The gold polish is even and consistent with no patchy areas. Silver polished pieces also looked great. Clearly a manufacturer who takes quality control seriously. Will recommend to family and friends.

First time visiting Johri Bazar and this shop was a great introduction to Jaipur jewellery shopping. The owner took time to explain the different styles and their origins. Left with a much better understanding of Rajasthani jewellery traditions and some lovely pieces.

The prices here are genuinely competitive. I compared rates across five shops in the Johri Bazar area and this one offered the best value without sacrificing quality. Bought three sets and all of them looked far more expensive than what I paid.

Highly recommend this shop for anyone looking for export quality Jaipur jewellery. The pieces have a professional finish and are packaged carefully to prevent damage during transit. Have been sourcing from here for two years with consistent satisfaction.

The customized jewellery manufacturing service here is excellent. Provided them with a design reference and they replicated it beautifully in kundan style. The turnaround time was reasonable and the communication was clear throughout the process.

Staff here was extremely patient while I tried on multiple pieces and kept changing my mind. Never felt rushed or pressured. Eventually found the perfect silver polished set for my sister's sangeet. The shopping experience was genuinely pleasant.

Their Jaipuri bangle collection is a treasure. So many designs in different metals and finishes. Bought a dozen bangles in assorted designs and they're getting worn regularly. The quality is holding up well even with daily use.

Visited Perfect Jewels on recommendation from a friend and was not disappointed. Their range of artificial diamond necklaces is impressive and the pieces look strikingly beautiful. Got a stunning necklace at a fraction of what a real diamond piece would cost.

The shop is well stocked with a variety of jewellery for every occasion. Whether you need something delicate for daily wear or something grand for a wedding, they seem to have it all. Very happy with the purchase I made for a festive occasion.

Buying wholesale jewellery in Jaipur can be overwhelming but this shop makes it easy. Clear pricing, good samples, and a team that understands what resellers need. Have been recommending them to other boutique owners in my network.

The antique finish on their oxidized silver pieces is done really well. Each piece has a weathered quality that looks genuinely aged rather than artificially treated. Bought several pieces for a themed photo shoot and they worked perfectly.

Their range of Rajasthani style jhumkas is vast and each design is distinct. I ended up buying six pairs in different styles. All of them are lightweight despite looking substantial. Great for regular wear without the discomfort of heavy earrings.

Shopping here felt like visiting a proper jewellery manufacturer rather than just a retail store. You can see the attention to detail in how the pieces are made. Bought a kundan set that has become my most complimented piece of jewellery.

Reliable and professional service. Placed a large order for a jewellery exhibition and everything was delivered on time with proper invoicing and packaging. The pieces looked excellent on the display and many sold out on the first day.

The meenakari jewellery here is some of the most vibrant I've seen. The colors in the enamel work are rich and well preserved. Bought a set almost a year ago and the colors are still as bright as when I first got them. Excellent durability.

Good mix of traditional and contemporary designs. Their designer pendant sets have a modern sensibility while still retaining the Jaipur handcraft quality. Perfect for someone who wants the authenticity of Jaipur jewellery with a current aesthetic.

Found this shop while looking for bridal jewellery options in Johri Bazar and ended up choosing it for the entire wedding jewellery set. The staff helped us coordinate pieces across different ceremonies. Outstanding service and beautiful products.

The gold polished pieces here have a warmth and richness that I haven't seen in similar price range products elsewhere. The polish is deep and even without any brassy undertones. Will definitely be back for more pieces in this style.

Excellent selection of silver polished jewellery sets for those who prefer a cooler tone. The pieces are elegant without being too flashy. Bought a full set for daily use and it pairs well with both traditional and casual outfits.

Visited with my mother who is very particular about jewellery quality. She was genuinely impressed by the kundan work here. The stones were set evenly and the base metal was sturdy. We ended up buying two sets and both were worth every rupee.

The bulk jewellery suppliers here understand what resellers need. Good quality, fair pricing, proper documentation, and reliable timelines. Have been sourcing from Johri Bazar for years and this shop has become my preferred stop.

Came across this shop while exploring the Pink City and the display window drew me in immediately. The craftsmanship on the pieces was evident even from outside. Stepped in and spent over an hour browsing. Bought four pieces and love all of them.

Their traditional jadau jewellery sets are authentic and beautifully detailed. Each piece tells a story of Rajasthani artisanship. Bought a pair of earrings and a matching necklace that have become my go-to for festive occasions.

The staff here genuinely knows their products. When I asked about the difference between kundan and polki, I got a clear and informative answer rather than a sales pitch. This kind of expertise builds real trust with customers.

Fantastic store for wholesale buyers. The catalogue is extensive and new designs are added regularly. Payment terms are fair and the team is responsive to queries. One of the better organised jewellery wholesalers in the Johri Bazar area.

Their party wear imitation jewellery is glamorous without being over the top. Found some really wearable statement pieces that I've already received compliments on. Pricing is very accessible for the design quality you're getting.

Bought a heavy bridal choker set here and was blown away by how magnificent it looked. The weight is substantial which adds to the sense of quality. Despite the heaviness, the clasp design distributes the weight well and it's comfortable to wear.

The shop is neatly arranged and displays make it easy to compare different designs side by side. Spent a productive hour browsing and came away with a clear idea of what I wanted. The purchase process was smooth and hassle-free.

Their artificial jewellery is made to a standard that many branded stores would struggle to match. The finishing, the stone setting, and the metal quality are all above average. Excellent value for boutique owners and retail customers alike.

Perfect Jewels has genuinely earned its reputation in the Johri Bazar market. The range is wide, the prices are fair, and the staff is knowledgeable. Have bought jewellery here multiple times and never been disappointed with any purchase.

I purchase jewellery for various cultural events and performances and this shop is now my primary source. The theatrical quality of their heavier pieces is ideal for stage use and the prices are well within our event budget. Very practical choice.

The traditional Jaipur handwork on the pieces here is evident in every detail. You can see the care that goes into the production. For anyone wanting authentic Jaipur jewellery rather than mass produced imitations, this is the right place.

Their silver polished sets are excellent for everyday formal wear. Not too heavy, not too delicate. The finish has held up well over months of regular use. Very happy with the durability and the overall look of the pieces I purchased.

Found some genuinely unique designs here that I hadn't seen in any other shop during my Jaipur trip. The designer earrings in particular had a fresh and contemporary feel while still using traditional Rajasthani techniques. Great combination.

The wholesale pricing at this shop is very transparent. No hidden charges or unexpected fees. What's quoted is what you pay. This level of honesty is rare and makes the whole business relationship much more comfortable for buyers.

I've been a regular customer here for three years now. The quality remains consistently high and new designs keep arriving regularly. It feels like they genuinely invest in their design and manufacturing process rather than cutting corners.

Bought jewellery here for a destination wedding in Jaipur and the pieces were perfect. The bridal set we chose had an authentic Rajasthani character that felt right for the occasion. Staff helped us select coordinated pieces for the whole family.

Their meenakari bangles are some of the finest I've seen in Jaipur. The enamel colors are vivid and the workmanship is precise. Bought a set of twelve bangles and they've become a staple in my wardrobe. Excellent purchase.

Visited specifically to look at their artificial diamond collection for an upcoming event. Was not disappointed. The pieces have a sparkle and elegance that genuinely rivals the look of real diamonds. Received many compliments at the function.

This shop is a great example of how traditional Indian jewellery manufacturing should be done. Care for the craft, attention to detail, and pride in the product are all evident. A shopping experience that feels authentic and rewarding.

The staff here were patient and genuinely helpful in guiding me through the different categories of jewellery. I went in not knowing exactly what I wanted and came out with a beautiful coordinated set for an upcoming family occasion.

Excellent shop for wholesale sourcing. The minimum order quantities are reasonable and the quality per piece is consistent across the entire order. Have placed three orders so far and all three have met or exceeded expectations.

The temple jewellery pieces here have a spiritual elegance that is hard to find in most commercial shops. The designs are faithful to traditional south Indian temple jewellery styles but with a Jaipur artisan's touch. Unique and beautiful.

Came here looking for a complete jewellery set for my daughter's wedding and the staff spent over an hour helping us put together the perfect combination. Patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in getting it right. Exceptional service.

The range of daily wear jewellery here is practical and stylish. Not everything has to be a big statement piece and this shop understands that. Found several low key beautiful pieces for regular use that won't look out of place in everyday settings.

Great experience as a first-time visitor to Johri Bazar. The shop at number 277 stood out for its organized display and the professionalism of the staff. Bought a few pieces as souvenirs and gifts, all of which were well received.

Their kundan necklace sets are elaborate and beautiful. The stone setting is precise with no loose stones or uneven placement. Bought one for a festival and it looked magnificent. Received so many compliments that I went back to buy another.

The Victorian style jewellery here is surprisingly well crafted. The filigree work on the pendants is delicate and the oxidized finish gives them a wonderful vintage feel. Bought two pieces as gifts and both recipients loved them.

Perfect Jewels offers some of the most competitive rates for bulk jewellery purchase in Jaipur. As someone who stocks jewellery for resale, this kind of pricing advantage makes a real difference to margins. Quality remains strong at these prices.

The shop has an excellent range of jewellery for different price points. Whether you want something under five hundred rupees or a premium piece over several thousand, they have good options at every tier. Very accommodating for all budgets.

Bought a matching set of necklace, earrings, and bangles for a family function and the set looked coordinated and beautiful. The silver polishing was even and the clasp mechanisms on the necklace and earrings were sturdy and reliable.

Their designer pendant sets in gold polish are elegant and versatile. Work well for both traditional Indian outfits and western formal wear. The pendants are not too heavy and the chains are well made. Very wearable and stylish pieces.

The Jaipur jewellery market has hundreds of shops but this one consistently comes up in recommendations. After my visit I understand why. The product quality, the staff attitude, and the pricing all combine to make it a standout destination.

Visited to source jewellery for a theatre production and found exactly what we needed. The dramatic heavier pieces in their collection are perfect for stage use. Staff understood our requirements and helped us select accordingly. Great support.

The oxidized jewellery range here is ideal for bohemian or ethnic fusion looks. The pieces are well designed with a rustic quality that looks intentional rather than cheap. Bought several pieces that have been getting a lot of wear and compliments.

Their wholesale jewellery catalogue has an impressive variety of styles. From traditional to contemporary, from heavy to delicate, they seem to cover the full spectrum. Makes it easy to source diverse inventory in one place. Very efficient for buyers.

Bought a pair of kundan earrings here that turned out to be the most complimented piece of jewellery I own. The design is classic Jaipur style but the execution is refined and modern. Exactly what good traditional jewellery should look like.

The shop at 277 Johri Bazar is easy to navigate and the displays are thoughtfully arranged. Similar styles and price points are grouped together which makes comparison shopping straightforward. A well-run store that respects the customer's time.

Their artificial diamond necklace and earring sets are a fantastic alternative for those who want the look of diamonds without the cost. The clarity of the stones and the setting quality are both impressive. Highly recommended for formal events.

Had a wonderful experience here during my Jaipur trip. The meenakari work on the bangles and earrings I bought is exquisite. Each piece is a small work of art. The craftsmanship here reflects generations of Rajasthani jewellery making tradition.

Good quality jewellery at prices that won't break the bank. The staff is friendly and doesn't use pressure tactics. Browsed for a while and bought two pieces without feeling rushed or hassled. The kind of shopping experience everyone deserves.

The gold polished jewellery here has a richness and warmth that I find more appealing than many of the brighter, more commercial finishes elsewhere. The colour depth of the polish is beautiful and adds to the overall premium feel of the pieces.

Bought jewellery from this shop for three family weddings now and the consistency of quality has been remarkable. Each time the pieces have been beautifully made and well finished. This kind of reliable quality is exactly what you want for important occasions.

The staff here spoke knowledgeably about the different regions of Rajasthani jewellery making and how the styles differ. This cultural context made the shopping experience genuinely enriching. Left with a better appreciation of the craft alongside my purchases.

Their bridal kundan sets are the most photographed jewellery I've ever bought. Every photo from the wedding had people asking where the jewellery came from. The visual impact is incredible and the quality held up beautifully through a long day.

Found some lovely pieces for my export business here. The quality meets international standards and the packaging can be customized for export. Good communication and professional handling of the order from start to finish.

The shop has a good mix of heritage Rajasthani designs and contemporary interpretations of traditional styles. This makes it appealing to a wide range of customers. Whether traditional or modern in taste, you'll find something worth buying here.

Their silver jewellery collection is worth exploring even if you came in looking for gold polished pieces. The silver work is elegant and the designs are thoughtfully different from the gold range. Bought pieces in both and love them equally.

The Jaipuri jewellery tradition is on full display at this shop. Each piece reflects the artisanal heritage of the region. For tourists and collectors alike, this is a genuine opportunity to take home a piece of real Rajasthani craft.

Very impressed with the customized manufacturing service. We provided a sketch and they produced samples within the agreed timeline. The samples closely matched the original design with some improvements that we approved. Very professional team.

The shop carries a broad selection of traditional Jhumkas in various metals and finishes. Found a pair of antique gold Jhumkas that have become my absolute favourite earrings. The weight is perfect and they swing beautifully when worn.

Their jewellery for boutiques program is well structured. Minimum order quantities are reasonable and the designs are curated to suit retail customers. Has helped my boutique offer a broader range without investing in too much inventory upfront.

Bought a heavy bridal necklace set here that drew genuine admiration at the wedding. The kundan work on the front is dense and well arranged and the overall weight gives it a sense of richness. Absolutely worth the investment for such an important occasion.

The shop has an excellent reputation in the Johri Bazar area for good reason. Their commitment to quality and fair pricing is evident in every interaction. Found it easy to trust their recommendations and ended up with purchases I'm very happy with.

Their latest jewellery designs for 2026 show a clear understanding of current fashion trends. The pieces feel fresh and relevant while retaining the traditional craftsmanship that makes Jaipur jewellery special. Great combination of old and new.

The direct factory pricing at this shop is a genuine advantage for wholesale buyers. You're dealing with the manufacturer directly which means better prices and faster resolution of any issues. Highly recommended for business sourcing.

Bought a set of silver polished bangles here that have quickly become my most worn pieces. They're not too heavy for daily use and the finish has stayed beautiful with minimal care. Excellent value for the quality and durability.

Visited on a recommendation from my travel guide and was thoroughly impressed. The range of Jaipur jewellery here is genuinely extensive and the quality is evident even to an untrained eye. Bought several pieces as gifts and all were very well received.

The antique gold plated pieces here have a character and depth that mass produced jewellery lacks. Each piece seems to carry a distinct personality. Bought a necklace that pairs beautifully with my ethnic wardrobe and gets worn frequently.

Their party wear artificial jewellery is the perfect solution for looking festive without worrying about safety or cost. The designs are glamorous and the quality is good enough that they can be reused multiple times without losing their appeal.

Staff at shop 277 Johri Bazar was genuinely helpful and approachable. Never felt like I was being sold to but rather guided. Ended up buying more than intended but was happy with every purchase. Great balance of helpfulness and respect for the customer.

The meena jewellery here is crafted with the precision that characterizes the best of Jaipur's jewellery tradition. Colors are vivid and the enamel work is dense and flawless. Bought a full set that has been the centerpiece of my jewellery collection.

Found some truly stunning pieces at very reasonable prices here. The market in Johri Bazar is competitive but this shop manages to stand out through a combination of design quality and fair pricing. A reliable choice for any jewellery buyer.

The traditional Jaipur handwork visible on the pieces here is what distinguishes this shop from the many generic jewellery stores. You can see that the artisans who made these pieces were skilled and took pride in their work. Authentic and beautiful.

Excellent experience sourcing jewellery for our corporate gifting requirements. The pieces were elegant without being ostentatious and the pricing fit within our gifting budget comfortably. The team handled our bulk requirement professionally and on time.

Visited this shop with my mother and grandmother who are both very knowledgeable about traditional jewellery. Both were impressed by the quality of the kundan work and the authenticity of the meenakari designs. High praise from experienced buyers.

Their wholesale jewellery market presence is strong and justified. The variety of pieces they carry across different styles and price points makes them a one stop solution for retail jewellery buyers. Very efficient and professional operation.

The shop manages to cater effectively to both wholesale buyers and individual retail customers. Neither type of customer feels like an afterthought. This versatility, combined with good quality, makes it a genuinely useful destination for everyone.

Bought a traditional Rajasthani style full bridal set here for a themed event and it was perfect. The combination of kundan, meena, and gold polish gave it a rich and authentic look. Exactly what we needed and at a very reasonable price.

The pendant sets here cover a wide range of styles from simple and elegant to elaborate and ornate. Found several options in the mid-range that balanced style and wearability perfectly. Happy with the choices I made and wear them regularly.

Their export quality jewellery has a finish and presentation standard that works well in international markets. Have sourced from here for my overseas retail business and received very positive feedback from customers on both quality and design.

Bought my first piece of proper Jaipur jewellery here and it set a standard I've since struggled to match elsewhere. The quality and character of the kundan piece I chose has made it a permanent favourite. Will return on every visit to Jaipur.

The range of wedding jewellery collection here is comprehensive. From the engagement to the reception, they have appropriate pieces for every wedding function. Staff understands the cultural significance of each occasion and advises accordingly.

Good transparency in pricing and a willingness to explain why certain pieces cost more than others. This kind of open communication builds trust and made the shopping experience much more comfortable. Happy with both the service and the products.

Their temple jewellery collection is authentic and beautifully crafted. The designs draw on traditional south Indian motifs but are executed with a Jaipur artisan's skill. Unique and beautiful pieces that stand out in any jewellery collection.

The shop at Johri Bazar has a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere. No hard selling, no pressure. Just good jewellery displayed well with knowledgeable staff available when needed. The kind of shopping experience that brings customers back.

Bought several pieces of oxidized silver jewellery here and they've all held up excellently. The oxidization hasn't faded or peeled which suggests good quality treatment. The designs are artistic and the pieces are getting regular compliments.

Their range of designer meenakari work is genuinely impressive. The precision of the enamel placement and the vibrancy of the colors make each piece feel special. Bought a set as a gift and it was the most appreciated present at the occasion.

The quality of the artificial diamond pieces here genuinely surprised me. The stones are clear and well cut and the settings are secure. Wore a necklace from here to a formal event and received several genuine compliments from well-dressed guests.

This shop is a must visit for anyone interested in authentic Jaipur jewellery. The breadth of the collection and the quality of the craftsmanship make it one of the standout destinations in the entire Johri Bazar market. Very highly recommended.

Purchased a customized set for a dance performance costume and the shop delivered exactly what was needed. The dramatic scale of the pieces worked perfectly on stage and the quality was good enough to survive multiple performances. Great service.

Their traditional Jhumkas and earring collection has both classic designs and contemporary updates. Found a pair of modern Jhumkas that have a geometric elegance alongside the traditional flared shape. Exactly the kind of hybrid design I was looking for.

Sourcing from here for my jewellery boutique has been consistently positive. The designs are on trend, the quality is reliable, and the team is responsive to any issues. Very few suppliers offer this combination of style quality and service.

The Jaipur Pink City jewellery market has many options but this shop consistently delivers on quality and variety. Their ability to cater to both wholesale and retail customers sets them apart from many competitors in the area.

Bought a full set of gold polished jewellery for my daughter's engagement ceremony and received many compliments on the quality and design. The set had an elegance that made the occasion feel even more special. Very happy with the purchase.

The shop's bridal collection is extensive and thoughtfully curated. From simple elegant pieces to grand ceremonial sets, they cover the full range of what a bride might need across different wedding functions. Very comprehensive and well organized.

I look for original Jaipur handwork when buying jewellery and this shop delivers that consistently. Each piece I've bought from here has the distinct character of handcrafted Rajasthani jewellery. Authentic and worth every rupee.

Perfect jewels at 277 Johri Bazar is a reliable destination for anyone looking for quality traditional jewellery at fair prices. Have recommended it to several friends who have all reported positive experiences. Consistently good across visits.

Their collection of heavy traditional pieces is matched by an equally impressive selection of delicate everyday jewellery. Both ends of the spectrum are well catered for, which makes this a versatile shopping destination regardless of what you're looking for.

The finishing on their silver polished pieces is clean and consistent. No rough edges or uneven polish. The clasps and fittings are also well made and feel secure. Small details like these distinguish genuinely well-made jewellery from cheaper alternatives.

Visited this shop as part of a jewellery sourcing trip and came away very impressed. The range of designs available and the competitive pricing make this an essential stop for anyone buying wholesale jewellery in Jaipur. Efficient and professional.

Their kundan meena pieces are the perfect blend of two of Rajasthan's most celebrated jewellery traditions. The stones and enamel work complement each other beautifully and the overall effect is richer than pieces that use only one technique.

Found some beautiful pieces here for my personal collection. The antique style necklaces in gold polish have an old world charm that I find very appealing. Each piece looks like it could belong to a museum collection. Beautifully crafted.

The shop is run by people who clearly know and love jewellery. That expertise and passion comes through in the quality of what they stock and how they talk about it. Makes shopping here feel like an education as well as a purchase.

Bought bulk jewellery here for a fashion show and every piece worked perfectly on the runway. The designs were bold enough to read well from a distance while being well made enough to withstand the handling of a busy backstage. Great choice.

Their daily wear collection is practical and attractively designed. Pieces that work with both traditional sarees and western outfits. Lightweight without looking cheap. Exactly the kind of versatile jewellery that most women need in their collection.

The staff here has a thorough understanding of different jewellery techniques and materials. Spent time explaining the kundan process to me which I found genuinely interesting. This kind of engagement makes for a much richer shopping experience.

Their gold polished choker sets are beautiful and photograph exceptionally well. Bought one for my friend's wedding photos and the pieces added so much to the final images. The bride received compliments on the jewellery from everyone who saw the photos.

Excellent selection of traditional Jaipuri bangles in various sizes and finishes. Found the perfect set in oxidized silver to match my festival outfit. The bangles are lightweight but sturdy and the finish has remained beautiful after weeks of use.

The shop at 277 Johri Bazar is a model of what a good jewellery shop should be. Clean, organized, well stocked, and staffed by knowledgeable people. Every element of the shopping experience is managed thoughtfully. Highly recommended.

Bought a large quantity of artificial jewellery for distribution at a family celebration and the quality was uniformly good across all pieces. No rejects or poor quality pieces in the lot. Very reliable quality control for bulk orders.

The range of bridal kundan sets here has to be seen to be appreciated. Each set is distinct and the craftsmanship on the better pieces is truly exceptional. Chose a set that has become the centrepiece of our family's wedding memories.

The combination of wide variety, good quality, and fair pricing makes this one of the best jewellery shops in Jaipur. Whether you're a tourist, a retail buyer, or a wholesale customer, there's something here for you and at a price that makes sense.

Came across this shop while looking for a gift for my mother and ended up buying jewellery for myself as well. The silver polished pieces caught my eye immediately and the quality convinced me to add several to my cart. Very happy shopper.

Their meenakari work on gold polished pieces is what sets them apart from many other shops in the Johri Bazar area. The enameling is careful and even and the colors stay vibrant. Investment quality pieces at everyday prices.

Perfect Jewels is a shop that delivers on its name. Found pieces here that were genuinely perfect for my requirements in terms of design, quality, and price. Every time I've visited I've come away completely satisfied with my purchases.

The Jaipur jewellery tradition is one of India's great craft heritage and this shop represents it well. The pieces here are authentic in their design and skilled in their execution. Proud to own several pieces that carry this heritage.

Their range of necklace sets covers a huge variety of lengths, styles, and finishes. From close-fitting chokers to long layered necklaces, they seem to have every style covered. Very useful for matching specific outfit requirements.

The wholesale pricing is genuinely attractive and the minimum orders are reasonable for small boutiques. Have been using them as a supplier for eighteen months with no significant issues. Reliable, professional, and good quality throughout.

Their traditional jadau pieces have the kind of detailed workmanship that takes considerable skill. The gold base, the uncut stones, and the enamel work all come together in pieces that feel genuinely special. Worth every rupee paid.
